message: History repeats itself.
The first time as tragedy.
The second time as farce.
Karl Heinrich Marx
The Eighteenth Brumaire of Louis Napoleon
The moment I awoke.
The moment time began to move.
Everything felt distant.
Is it that way for everyone?
Or just me?
What was the first thing that came into sight when I awoke?
I always try to remember that.
What is the scenery of awakening...
I'm trying to remember that.
A drop of water fell in the distance.
I heard the sound of a drop of water breaking somewhere in the distance.
That which is broken imparts its moisture upon the earth.
Only through breaking can it grant its blessing.
Because once broken, the blessing is able to soak into the earth.
Where is this place...
The confusion after awakening.
Doesn't everyone feel it?
Or is it a confusion that only I feel?
When I came to, I was here in this place.
My eyes opened in bed.
I was probably in my own room.
It was definitely my own room.
A hazy scene.
A hazy texture.
A hazy memory.
Everything felt hazy, but... there was one thing I could say for sure.
My spirit was unreasonably calm,
For no reason at all, I could calmly observe all phenomena.
In this hazy world, the only thing that was clear was my unnaturally calm heart.
My calm heart... So calm as to be cruel... It observed everything from afar.
Until yesterday, the scenery was so near.
Until yesterday, the scenery was so fun.
Until yesterday, the scenery was so beautiful.
Until yesterday, the scenery was so dear.
I calmly watched... from afar... everything that I had so loved
I always try to remember the scenery from the moment I wake.
I always try to remember the scenery from the beginning.
The scenery that should be there at the moment I wake.
A calm spirit.
Far in the distance...
All emotion.
Within this hazy consciousness... first, I turned on the computer in my room.
I organized my memories while looking at the computer screen.
Finished words lined up on the display.
A logo showed on the screen.
All emotion... was far away.
A story that doesn't say anything.
A story that doesn't move the spirit.
Could I tell you... such a fairy tale...?
Emotion,
Pain,
Pleasure,
They're all jewels shining far off in the distance.
But even then,
You must live happily!
